summary: Created .github/workflows/ci.yml running nix flake check on push/pull_request (cachix/install-nix-action@v31, actions/checkout@v7, cancel-in-progress concurrency group). Documented an optional opt-in local pre-push hook in README.md. Local nix flake check passes (33.159s) and the workflow YAML validates. Phases 1-3 of the plan are complete and both files are staged (not committed); Phase 4 (commit/push/confirm first CI run) is deferred to the orchestrator per orchestrator-mode instructions.

artifacts.summary: Added optional opt-in local flake-check pre-push hook documentation under Maintenance
Implementation summary with verification results and Phase 4 deferral note

completion_data.completion_summary: Added a nix flake check GitHub Actions CI gate (.github/workflows/ci.yml) and documented an optional opt-in pre-push hook in README.md; both files staged and verified locally (flake check green, YAML valid). Commit/push/CI-confirmation deferred to the orchestrator.

next_steps: Orchestrator: commit the two staged files (.github/workflows/ci.yml, README.md) with message 'task 84: add nix flake check CI gate' (+ session id), branch off master first if needed, push, then confirm the first Actions run is green via gh run list --workflow=ci.yml.
